title: enable different workday/weekend settings for individual team members
excerpt: my teams have different working weekdays, so trying to automate leave calculators/time worked in one single calendar is a nightmare. It should be easy to set each team member’s working week at their individual settings l…

posts.author: alexF (Alex Finn)
posts.cookedHtml: my teams have different working weekdays, so trying to automate leave calculators/time worked in one single calendar is a nightmare. It should be easy to set each team member’s working week at their individual settings level so that any dates entered (e.g. annual leave) automatically takes their personal work pattern into account.

posts.author: kolaai (alfred)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello @alexF,

Welcome to the community

You can now do this using the Date Check app. You can set holidays for teams and for individual users. Click here for early access
